feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I believe I've finally found the secret to their success after all these years--…
entry.content: I believe I've finally found the secret to their success after all these years--almost as mysterious as Jon Jon's mysteriously un-wrinkled countenance--hard rock so inoffensive it's less Aerosmith than Air Supply. Seriously, Bon Jovi meant so little short or long term that I'd always assumed the group broke up in the fabled '90s, taking all their releases since then as reunions or one-shots, and I couldn't seem to figure out why the product kept coming in the five seconds I stopped to think abou

entry.content: June 12, 1994 7:15–8:50 p.m.: Sedation & Setup** > O.J. returns home after his daughter’s recital. > Kato Kaelin keeps him indoors and spikes his drink with Rohypnol during a McDonald’s run in the Bentley. >Brown family members secretly drug Nicole and her children. >A Caucasian man waits outside Mezzaluna; Nicole’s Jeep is later found wiped clean. 8:55–9:45 p.m.: Staging the Scene** > Sedated group arrives at dark Bundy Drive home. >Kaelin monitors O.J., disables phones, extracts his blood, cha

entry.content: When I was 18, I self diagnosed myself with autism after I watched a talk show that mentioned about it. I should be diagnosed when I was a child. I had signs of autism like walking on tiptoes, unable to make friends, difficulty to socialize, prefer to be alone, always in my own world and bad digestive system.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: The secret of Heaven is that it's all in preparation for our eternal life with G…
entry.content: The secret of Heaven is that it's all in preparation for our eternal life with God. That's why the sacraments are so important, and that marriage is one of them. Basically, humans have their entire life to find another soul to partner up with for the rest of eternity. Choose the right person, and you're already halfway to Paradise.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: When this voice over here, the real you, is saying, "Get the h*ck out of here. G…
entry.content: When this voice over here, the real you, is saying, "Get the h*ck out of here. Go. You're nobody. You've always been nobody." And then you have to create another voice over here that is saying, "You're better than that other voice." When that alarm clock goes off at 4 or 5 in the morning, your mind says, "No." You just say, "This is what we do." There's going to be more times you do something that you don't want to do than you're going to want to do it. This is when I realized that the human min

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I've got a background in various humanist disciplines like philosophy and lingui…
entry.content: I've got a background in various humanist disciplines like philosophy and linguistics/semiotics. How do I make use of this in the age of AI? I know this is a very broad question, but I'd like to connect this stuff to my passion for technology, and LLMs seem like the perfect fit, but I have no idea where to even start. Should I try to develop a local model?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: China warns about AI risks with Anthropic's Claude Code
entry.content: >The Chinese Ministry of Industry and Information Technology said Wednesday its cybersecurity threat platform found "AI coding tool Claude Code contains a security back-door vulnerability that poses a serious threat." >U.S.-based Anthropic last month blamed Chinese company Alibaba for attempting to extract its AI capabilities, which are not officially available in China. >Users should uninstall or upgrade from the affected Claude Code versions, 2.1.91 to 2.1.196, China's cybersecurity platform s

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >AI will replace programmers I don’t get if these posts are made seriously or if…
entry.content: >AI will replace programmers I don’t get if these posts are made seriously or if it’s just bait. AI can’t engineer. I have never seen AI manage to do anything more than write very specific snippets of code, where I had to direct it carefully, meaning I had to know exactly what it was doing and inform it when it was doing it wrong, and I had to know how to review its code. So it’s a boilerplate generator or at best a pretty nice time saver able to generate non boilerplate code and a nice companio

No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Predictions
entry.content: 1. Palantir, or systems that are like it, will drive data management everywhere. It will be in your hospital, your stores, your airports, your ISP, etc. In light of the efficiency these systems offer, their controversy will be considered regrettable. 2. Each state in the U.S will have vastly different laws in contrast to the federal law. 3. If ID verification is implemented, our speech will mostly stay the same. It will be extremely rare for a user to be permanently ID-banned from a service, as

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I don't get the meltdown over physical.
entry.content: Digital is not inherently worse for ownership in any way because digital games are also stored on a physical object in your house: your SSD. The real issue is DRM. On PC, with no DRM or cracked DRM, there's nothing that can be done to take your game away even if you don't have a cheap piece of plastic on your shelf. This is because you own your PC and have full control over it But on console, the entire OS is the DRM. You don't have full control over the hardware so games can be taken away from

entry.title: /b/ Random: My mentally handicapped friend killed my cousin 16 years ago after she stopped h…
entry.content: My mentally handicapped friend killed my cousin 16 years ago after she stopped her car to give him a lift home. He sent me a video on his phone of what he had done and these are a couple of stills of said video. I don't know why I kept these pictures I find them very disturbing. I know it's shocking but I think sharing this might help me get over it at last. She was 37, her name was Anne and she was a very dedicated mom of two. rip. I have forgiven him for doing it. He didn't have a full underst

entry.title: /mu/ Music: For the older people on here, how big of a sea change was music after 9/11
entry.content: When did Nu metal die, and mall emo begin. Did it happen over night? or was it more like a gradual shift. When was the last year Nu Metal was relevant? I'm a older zoomer who barely remembers that era. My oldest cousin is a 85 Millennial, he always claimed Nu Metal died around 2003, and that Mall Emo was more like 2004.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Motorola Xoom Firmware
entry.content: I need Motorola Xoom firmware build HLK75C. Searched everywhere, nothing. Can compile from AOSP sources obviously, but I specifically need original user/release-keys build or at least OTA to this exact build. Anybody has it or knows where to find?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: https://news.samsung.com/global/sam sung-begins-mass-production-of-pm17 63-ssd-o…
entry.content: https://news.samsung.com/global/sam sung-begins-mass-production-of-pm17 63-ssd-optimized-for-next-generatio n-ai-infrastructure PM1763 is available in 4-terabyte (TB), 8TB and 16TB capacities, with the 16TB configuration delivering industry-leading performance with sequential read and write speeds of up to 28,400 megabytes-per-second (MB/s) and 21,900MB/s, respectively — more than 2 times the performance of its predecessor, PM1753. Why don't you have PCIe 6.0, /g/?

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I live in a major city and I am constantly attending open mics. Anyone else who …
entry.content: I live in a major city and I am constantly attending open mics. Anyone else who does this has seen the type of performance where the person has no instrument and they sing or rap over an instrumental they made or bought. While that isnt bad on its own, I have never seen a good version of this, it is ALWAYS a very mediocre window into some amateur's delusions of grandeur. I genuinely dont believe that the alleged fans of fakemink or osamason or ken carson or a rapper like that are even enjoying t
